scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn adds null when input string is null (aString == null)
scenarios.precondition: Use a simple stub DfColumn that records added objects; no mocking framework needed
pseudocode: GIVEN aString = null and stubColumn initialized

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn adds null when input string is empty after trim (trimmed.isEmpty() == true)
scenarios.precondition: Use a simple stub DfColumn that records added objects; no mocking framework needed

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn adds null when input string contains only whitespace (trimmed.isEmpty() == true)
scenarios.precondition: Use a simple stub DfColumn that records added objects; no mocking framework needed

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn parses and adds LocalDate when input matches default pattern uuuu-M-d
scenarios.precondition: Instantiate DateSchemaColumn with null pattern to use default; use stubColumn
pseudocode: GIVEN aString = "2021-12-31" and default-pattern DateSchemaColumn and stubColumn

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn parses and adds LocalDate when input matches custom pattern dd/MM/uuuu
scenarios.precondition: Instantiate DateSchemaColumn with pattern "dd/MM/uuuu"; use stubColumn
pseudocode: GIVEN aString = "31/12/2021" and custom-pattern DateSchemaColumn("dd/MM/uuuu") and stubColumn

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn throws DateTimeParseException when input does not match pattern
scenarios.precondition: Instantiate DateSchemaColumn with default pattern; use stubColumn
pseudocode: GIVEN aString = "12-31-2021" and default-pattern DateSchemaColumn and stubColumn

scenarios.description: parseAndAddToColumn throws DateTimeParseException for invalid date under strict resolver
scenarios.precondition: Instantiate DateSchemaColumn with default pattern; use stubColumn
pseudocode: GIVEN aString = "2021-02-29" and default-pattern DateSchemaColumn and stubColumn
